overall.description: A smooth drone-style flythrough in a game engine showcasing a historic stone cathedral perched on a rocky hillside. The camera navigates through a narrow mossy canyon, approaches the grand building with its green dome, and emerges onto an open overlook with panoramic views of a distant city and surrounding landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with distant city view transitioning to narrow canyon entrance

events.description: camera turns from city overlook and enters narrow mossy canyon

agents.ego_description: flying smoothly along a rocky path, transitioning from open overlook into a narrow canyon

entered.detail: urban buildings visible on the horizon under blue sky
tall green moss-covered rock walls forming canyon sides
large historic building with green dome visible in distance

segments.scene_description: Starting from a rocky overlook with panoramic views of a distant city, the camera turns and enters a narrow canyon passage between mossy rock walls, with the white stone cathedral visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mossy canyon path leading toward cathedral

agents.ego_description: gliding through the narrow canyon, approaching the cathedral building ahead

entered.detail: small waterfall cascading down rocks beside the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through the narrow mossy canyon, with tall rock walls on both sides, getting closer to the white stone cathedral that dominates the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of historic cathedral with waterfall feature

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the cathedral facade and green dome

agents.ego_description: approaching the cathedral base and looking up at the towering stone architecture and green dome

entered.detail: intricate stone carvings and tall arched windows on the cathedral wall

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the base of the cathedral, tilting up to reveal the imposing stone facade and green dome towering above, with the waterfall now visible up close on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open overlook terrace with panoramic city views

events.description: camera rounds the building corner and emerges into open panoramic overlook

agents.ego_description: circling around the cathedral and emerging onto an open terrace with expansive views of the city and landscape below

entered.detail: cityscape visible again from the elevated overlook position
low stone wall along the edge of the overlook
lush green fields and trees below the terrace

segments.scene_description: Rounding the corner of the cathedral, the camera emerges onto a wide open terrace revealing panoramic views of the distant city, green valleys, and surrounding landscape under a bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide panoramic vista into a claustrophobic canyon before emerging at the foot of a grand cathedral. It begins at a rocky overlook facing a distant city, then turns sharply to enter a narrow passage flanked by towering mossy rock walls. As the camera moves steadily through this corridor, the white stone cathedral grows from a distant silhouette to a dominating presence ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the base of the structure, tilting upward to reveal the imposing facade and green dome beside a cascading waterfall. Finally, the camera rounds the corner of the building to emerge onto a wide open terrace, expanding the view once more to encompass green valleys and the distant city under a bright blue sky.
